tasks.name: Scaffold Repo & Environment
tasks.description: Initialize git, create virtualenv, node env, and basic folder structure.

tasks.name: Scaffold Backend Endpoints & DB Models
tasks.description: Set up FastAPI app, database models (Users, Chats, Docs, Schemes), and basic routes.
subtasks: Create API routes (chat, upload, eligibility, schemes, auth, health)

tasks.name: Scaffold Frontend Chat UI
tasks.description: Create React app with chat interface, message streaming, and basic layout.

tasks.name: Ingest & Vector Store (FAISS)
tasks.description: Implement document ingestion, text splitting, embedding, and FAISS storage.

tasks.name: RAG Pipeline & LLM Connector
tasks.description: Connect to LLM API, implement retrieval logic, and prompt engineering.

tasks.name: OCR & PDF Parsing
tasks.description: Integrate Tesseract and PyMuPDF for scanned document processing.
subtasks: Install Tesseract (if possible) or use library wrapper
Implement OCR logic in ingestion pipeline

tasks.name: Eligibility Rule Engine
tasks.description: Create a rule engine to check user eligibility for schemes.

tasks.name: Authentication & Session Store
tasks.description: Implement JWT authentication and session management.

tasks.name: Admin UI
tasks.description: Create an admin interface to manage schemes and documents.

tasks.name: Dockerize & Compose
tasks.description: Create Dockerfiles and docker-compose.yml for full stack deployment.
subtasks: Create docker-compose.yml (Postgres, Redis, FAISS, Backend, Frontend)

tasks.name: Tests & CI
tasks.description: Write unit and integration tests and setup GitHub Actions.

tasks.name: Smoke Test & Demo
tasks.description: Perform final verification and record demo video.
